summary.en: The fastest, cheapest way to use AI with ITAR or CUI data.
summary.zh: 在 ITAR 或 CUI 資料上使用 AI 最快、最便宜的方式。

highlight.en: Consus routes AI requests to secure, compliant infrastructure so aerospace and defense firms use the latest models without compliance or backend work.
highlight.zh: Consus 將 AI 請求導向安全合規的基礎設施,讓航太與國防公司無須處理合規與後端工程即可使用最新模型。

summary.en: Applied research lab curating data solutions for foundation model development.
summary.zh: 為基礎模型開發策劃資料解決方案的應用研究實驗室。

highlight.en: AfterQuery curates data solutions for frontier foundation model development and serves every frontier AI lab.
highlight.zh: AfterQuery 為前沿基礎模型開發策劃資料解決方案,服務每一家前沿 AI 實驗室。

summary.en: The JavaScript framework for building AI agents, from the Gatsby devs.
summary.zh: 由 Gatsby 開發者打造、用於建構 AI 代理的 JavaScript 框架。

highlight.en: Built by the Gatsby team, Mastra is an open-source TypeScript framework bundling workflows, agents, RAG, and evals to ship production AI apps on any cloud.
highlight.zh: 由 Gatsby 團隊打造,Mastra 是一套開源 TypeScript 框架,整合工作流程、代理、RAG 與評估,可在任何雲端部署正式環境 AI 應用。

summary.en: AI-native commercial insurance brokerage.
summary.zh: AI 原生的商業保險經紀公司。

highlight.en: Harper automates commercial insurance workflows with AI to secure optimal coverage fast, starting with mid-sized businesses that have complex insurance needs.
highlight.zh: Harper 以 AI 自動化商業保險流程,快速取得最佳承保,初期聚焦於保險需求複雜的中型企業。

summary.en: Software-enabled CNC parts supplier delivering custom metal parts in four days or less.
summary.zh: 軟體驅動的 CNC 零件供應商,四天內交付客製金屬零件。

highlight.en: Engineers upload a CAD model to Forge's software-enabled factories and get low-volume CNC parts in four days, an "Amazon experience" for custom metal.
highlight.zh: 工程師將 CAD 模型上傳到 Forge 軟體驅動的工廠,四天而非數週內即可收到小批量 CNC 零件,為客製金屬零件帶來「Amazon 般的體驗」。

summary.en: AI agents that design better clinical trials faster.
summary.zh: 設計更佳臨床試驗、加速流程的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Delineate turns existing clinical trial research into specialized datasets, saving scientists months and working with two of the largest pharma companies.
highlight.zh: Delineate 將既有臨床試驗研究整理為專用資料集,為科學家節省數月時間,並與兩家最大的製藥公司合作。

summary.en: Reusable satellites for zero-gravity manufacturing.
summary.zh: 用於零重力製造的可重複使用衛星。

highlight.en: Reditus is building reusable satellites for zero-g manufacturing, with its first full orbital recovery mission set to launch in April 2026.
highlight.zh: Reditus 正在打造可重複使用的零重力製造衛星,首次完整入軌回收任務預計於 2026 年 4 月發射。

summary.en: AI accountant for accounting firms.
summary.zh: 為會計師事務所打造的 AI 會計師。

highlight.en: Cifrato's AI agents run end-to-end accounting workflows: invoice capture and ERP upload, payment and reconciliation, tax filings, and on-demand CFO insights.
highlight.zh: Cifrato 的 AI 代理執行端到端會計流程:發票擷取與上傳 ERP、付款與對帳、報稅,以及隨需的 CFO 洞察。

summary.en: AI to monitor thousands of security cameras with natural language.
summary.zh: 以自然語言監控數千支監視攝影機的 AI。

highlight.en: Conntour lets one person query thousands of cameras in plain language to search footage, set real-time alerts, and extract data, far beyond fixed analytics.
highlight.zh: Conntour 讓一個人能以自然語言查詢數千支攝影機,搜尋影像、設定即時警報並擷取資料,超越固定參數影像分析的限制。

summary.en: AI hiring platform powered by expert recruiters.
summary.zh: 由專家招募者驅動的 AI 招募平台。

highlight.en: Contrario pairs a network of expert recruiters with hiring-specific AI agents, used by Wispr Flow, Listen Labs, and 200+ fast-growing companies.
highlight.zh: Contrario 將專家招募者網絡與招募專用 AI 代理結合,獲 Wispr Flow、Listen Labs 等 200 多家快速成長公司採用。

summary.en: AI for insurance verification and billing at dental clinics.
summary.zh: 為牙科診所處理保險核驗與帳務的 AI。

highlight.en: Toothy's AI agents automate the insurance workflow at dental practices — including voice-AI insurance calls — to cut the 160+ hours a month clinics spend on it.
highlight.zh: Toothy 的 AI 代理自動化牙科診所的保險流程,包含以語音 AI 撥打保險電話,減少診所每月逾 160 小時的相關工作。

summary.en: AI-powered operating system for distributors and OEMs.
summary.zh: 為經銷商與 OEM 打造的 AI 作業系統。

highlight.en: SalesPatriot is a back-office OS with custom AI workflows that unify procurement, quotes, and purchase orders across the dozen systems supply teams juggle.
highlight.zh: SalesPatriot 是一套後勤作業系統,以客製 AI 工作流程整合採購、報價與採購單,串連供應鏈團隊使用的十多套系統。

summary.en: Platform for building RL environments and evals.
summary.zh: 用於建構強化學習環境與評估的平台。

highlight.en: HUD builds agentic evals and RL environments for Computer Use Agents, offering what it calls the first comprehensive CUA evaluation framework for frontier labs.
highlight.zh: HUD 為電腦操作代理(CUA)打造代理式評估與強化學習環境,推出其稱為首個完整的 CUA 評估框架,並與前沿實驗室合作。

summary.en: A personal, memory-based operating system where your life context becomes understanding.
summary.zh: 一套以記憶為本的個人作業系統,把你的生活脈絡轉化為理解。

highlight.en: Pickle pairs a web app (Chat) with AR glasses (Pickle 1) to continuously learn a user's real-world context, making AI proactive rather than reactive.
highlight.zh: Pickle 結合網頁應用(Chat)與 AR 眼鏡(Pickle 1),持續學習使用者的真實情境,讓 AI 主動而非被動。

summary.en: AI-native ATS/CRM for recruiting firms.
summary.zh: 為招募公司打造的 AI 原生 ATS/CRM。

highlight.en: Spott combines a full ATS and CRM with AI agents across the recruiting workflow into one platform, replacing clunky, fragmented tools not built for AI.
highlight.zh: Spott 將完整的 ATS、CRM 與覆蓋整個招募流程的 AI 代理整合為單一平台,取代笨重、零碎且非為 AI 設計的工具。

summary.en: AI to understand engineering work.
summary.zh: 用以理解工程工作的 AI。

highlight.en: Weave uses AI to understand engineering work, giving teams visibility into how engineering gets done.
highlight.zh: Weave 運用 AI 理解工程工作,讓團隊看清工程是如何完成的。

summary.en: Enterprise-grade AI support reps for call centers.
summary.zh: 為客服中心打造的企業級 AI 客服專員。

highlight.en: Calltree's AI support reps handle voice calls and chats and can also operate internal enterprise tools like a homegrown CRM or dashboards, like trained humans.
highlight.zh: Calltree 的 AI 客服專員處理語音來電與聊天,還能操作自建 CRM 或內部儀表板等企業工具,如同受過訓練的真人。

summary.en: AI quote and order automation for distributors and manufacturers.
summary.zh: 為經銷商與製造商打造的 AI 報價與訂單自動化。

highlight.en: Mercura automates quotes and orders in the construction supply chain, letting sales teams process requests in minutes instead of days to focus on winning deals.
highlight.zh: Mercura 自動化營建供應鏈的報價與訂單,讓業務團隊在數分鐘而非數天內處理需求,專注於贏得訂單。

summary.en: AI workers for manufacturing and distribution.
summary.zh: 為製造與配銷打造的 AI 工作者。

highlight.en: Axal helps manufacturers and distributors eliminate manual work by automating their operational processes with AI.
highlight.zh: Axal 以 AI 自動化營運流程,協助製造商與經銷商消除人工作業。

summary.en: Be the answer in AI search — AI SEO across SEO, GEO and AEO.
summary.zh: 在 AI 搜尋中成為答案——橫跨 SEO、GEO 與 AEO 的 AI SEO。

highlight.en: AthenaHQ helps brands appear in AI-generated answers across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and Gemini, measuring visibility and what AI engines cite.
highlight.zh: AthenaHQ 協助品牌出現在 ChatGPT、Perplexity、Claude 與 Gemini 的 AI 生成答案中,衡量能見度以及 AI 引擎引用的內容。

summary.en: AI-native sales platform for outbound revenue teams.
summary.zh: 為外撥營收團隊打造的 AI 原生銷售平台。

highlight.en: FuseAI consolidates the GTM stack — data, enrichment, multi-channel automation, real-time buying signals, and AI execution — into one outbound sales system.
highlight.zh: FuseAI 將進入市場技術堆疊——資料、資料擴充、多通路自動化、即時購買訊號與 AI 執行——整合為單一的外撥銷售系統。

summary.en: Building the open-source smart glasses operating system.
summary.zh: 打造開源智慧眼鏡作業系統。

highlight.en: Mentra is building an open-source OS and app store for smart glasses, positioning it as the platform for the next computing wave now that the hardware is ready.
highlight.zh: Mentra 正在為智慧眼鏡打造開源作業系統與應用商店,在硬體成熟之際,將其定位為下一波運算平台。

summary.en: AI voice and texting agents for customer service and lead qualification.
summary.zh: 用於客服與名單篩選的 AI 語音與簡訊代理。

highlight.en: Leaping AI deploys voice and texting agents for service, lead qualification, and scheduling, automating contact centers of 100+ agents at a 90% CSAT score.
highlight.zh: Leaping AI 部署語音與簡訊代理處理客服、名單篩選與預約排程,自動化逾百名專員的客服中心,並維持 90% 客戶滿意度。

summary.en: The OS for hospital workforce management.
summary.zh: 醫院人力管理作業系統。

highlight.en: YouShift uses AI to automate hospital shift scheduling, replacing legacy software and full-time schedulers as a first step toward broader workforce management.
highlight.zh: YouShift 以 AI 自動化醫院排班,取代老舊軟體與全職排班人員,作為邁向更廣泛人力管理的第一步。

summary.en: We help law enforcement solve crime.
summary.zh: 協助執法機關偵破犯罪。

highlight.en: Law enforcement is drowning in data; Closure helps agencies search it to solve crime, supporting local, state, and federal departments nationwide.
highlight.zh: 執法機關被資料淹沒,Closure 協助他們搜尋資料以偵破犯罪,服務全國地方、州與聯邦各級單位。

summary.en: AI-powered patient identification for clinical trials.
summary.zh: 為臨床試驗提供 AI 驅動的病患辨識。

highlight.en: HealthKey uses AI to prescreen a clinic's existing patients against trial eligibility criteria, helping doctors' offices enroll qualifying patients faster.
highlight.zh: HealthKey 以 AI 將診所現有病患預先比對試驗合格標準,協助診所招募符合資格的病患並增加營收。

summary.en: Making humanoid robots dexterous enough to thread a needle.
summary.zh: 讓人形機器人靈巧到能穿針引線。

highlight.en: Proception is developing the dexterity that lets humanoid robots perform fine-motor tasks as precise as threading a needle.
highlight.zh: Proception 正在開發讓人形機器人具備穿針般精細動作能力的靈巧度。

summary.en: Computational law.
summary.zh: 運算法律。

highlight.en: SAMMY Labs works on computational law, applying computation to the legal domain.
highlight.zh: SAMMY Labs 投入運算法律,將運算方法應用於法律領域。

summary.en: AI drug discovery platform for neurotherapeutics.
summary.zh: 為神經治療藥物打造的 AI 藥物發現平台。

highlight.en: Exin uses AI trained on in-house multimodal mouse data to discover neurotherapeutics, starting with epilepsies linked to autism and Parkinson's disease.
highlight.zh: Exin 運用以自家多模態小鼠資料與高通量研究訓練的 AI 發現神經治療藥物,初期聚焦與自閉症及帕金森氏症相關的癲癇。

summary.en: Autonomous patrol boats for national security.
summary.zh: 用於國家安全的自主巡邏艇。

highlight.en: Splash develops low-cost autonomous surface vessels to defend assets like oil rigs and shipping terminals, aiming to make traditional naval vessels obsolete.
highlight.zh: Splash 開發低成本自主水面載具,保護鑽油平台與航運碼頭等資產,目標是讓傳統海軍艦艇走入歷史。

summary.en: Stablecoin API for global payments.
summary.zh: 用於全球支付的穩定幣 API。

highlight.en: BlindPay's API lets companies send and receive money worldwide across fiat, stablecoins, and blockchains, handling the complex compliance and regulatory work.
highlight.zh: BlindPay 的 API 讓公司能透過法幣、穩定幣與區塊鏈在全球收付款,並代為處理複雜的合規與監管事務。

summary.en: AI estimating and detailing for Division 8 doors, frames and hardware.
summary.zh: 為第八類門、框與五金提供 AI 估算與細部設計。

highlight.en: Bild AI reads blueprints and specs to auto-generate door schedules, price bids, and export to Division 8 ERPs, helping clients bid 50% more with smaller teams.
highlight.zh: Bild AI 讀取藍圖與規格以自動生成門表、為標案定價並匯入第八類 ERP,協助客戶以更精簡的團隊多投 50% 的標案。

summary.en: AI-powered student information system for K-12 schools.
summary.zh: 為 K-12 學校打造的 AI 學生資訊系統。

highlight.en: Scout is an AI-powered SIS — the core system of record for K-12 — that automates district busywork from attendance tracking to annual compliance reports.
highlight.zh: Scout 是一套 AI 驅動的學生資訊系統(K-12 的核心記錄系統),自動化從出勤追蹤到年度合規報告的學區雜務。

summary.en: Operand is an early-stage B2B startup from Y Combinator's Winter 2025 batch.
summary.zh: Operand 是 Y Combinator 2025 冬季梯次的早期 B2B 新創公司。

highlight.en: Operand is a US-based B2B company in YC's Winter 2025 batch; further public details about its product are not yet available.
highlight.zh: Operand 是 YC 2025 冬季梯次的美國 B2B 公司;其產品的更多公開細節目前尚未公布。

summary.en: AI browser workforce for operations teams.
summary.zh: 為營運團隊打造的 AI 瀏覽器工作隊。

highlight.en: Asteroid builds and hosts AI browser agents for back-office tasks, adding guardrails, evaluations, and human oversight for reliability in regulated industries.
highlight.zh: Asteroid 為後勤工作建構並託管 AI 瀏覽器代理,加入防護機制、評估與人工監督,即使在受監管產業也能維持可靠度。

summary.en: AI performance monitoring for factory workers.
summary.zh: 為工廠工人提供 AI 績效監控。

highlight.en: Optifye places cameras in factories and uses vision AI to tell supervisors in real time who's working, turning the opaque shop floor into measurable output.
highlight.zh: Optifye 在工廠裝設攝影機,以視覺 AI 即時告知主管誰在工作,把過去如黑箱的生產現場轉為可衡量的產出。

summary.en: Claude Code plugin that reduces token consumption and cost by 50%.
summary.zh: 可降低 50% Token 消耗與成本的 Claude Code 外掛。

highlight.en: The WOZCODE plugin runs inside Claude Code and is 25–55% cheaper and faster, beating Claude Code alone on Terminal Bench 2.0 (68% vs 58%).
highlight.zh: WOZCODE 外掛在 Claude Code 中運行,便宜 25–55% 且更快,在 Terminal Bench 2.0 上勝過單獨的 Claude Code(68% 對 58%)。

summary.en: Manufacturing the most powerful chips, 15x faster.
summary.zh: 以快 15 倍的速度製造最強大的晶片。

highlight.en: Inversion builds a lithography machine that shrinks particle accelerators 1000x for a high-power light source to double transistor density and reshore fabs.
highlight.zh: Inversion 打造一台微影機,將粒子加速器縮小 1000 倍以產生高功率光源,目標是讓電晶體密度加倍並把晶片製造帶回西方。

summary.en: The LLM eval and observability platform for AI quality.
summary.zh: 為 AI 品質打造的 LLM 評估與可觀測性平台。

highlight.en: Built by the creators of DeepEval (16k stars, 8M monthly downloads), Confident AI lets enterprises evaluate, observe, red team, and govern AI apps in one place.
highlight.zh: 由 DeepEval(1.6 萬星、每月 800 萬次下載)的開發者打造,Confident AI 讓企業在單一平台評估、觀測、紅隊測試並治理 AI 應用。

summary.en: Leading open-source web agent project, with 50k stars in three months.
summary.zh: 領先的開源網頁代理專案,三個月內獲 5 萬顆星。

highlight.en: Browser Use enables AI to control the browser and is the biggest open-source web agent project, gaining 40k GitHub stars in its first three months.
highlight.zh: Browser Use 讓 AI 能操控瀏覽器,是最大的開源網頁代理專案,前三個月便獲得 4 萬顆 GitHub 星。

summary.en: AI copilot that automates admin work for veterinary professionals.
summary.zh: 為獸醫專業人員自動化行政工作的 AI 副駕。

highlight.en: Veterinarians spend 40% of their time on admin and over 20% on note-taking alone; Vetnio automates that so they can focus on caring for animals.
highlight.zh: 獸醫有 40% 的時間花在行政工作、光是寫病歷就超過 20%;Vetnio 將其自動化,讓他們專注於照顧動物。

summary.en: An AI agent with a computer.
summary.zh: 一個配備電腦的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Bud is an agent with a computer, usable from web, text, or Telegram, that can code, fully drive a browser, produce professional work, and run autonomously.
highlight.zh: Bud 是配備電腦的代理,可透過網頁、簡訊或 Telegram 使用,能寫程式、完整操控瀏覽器、產出專業工作並自主運行。

summary.en: Awen translates intent into exceptional visuals through conversation.
summary.zh: Awen 透過對話將意圖轉化為出色的視覺作品。

highlight.en: Instead of prompts, parameters, and node graphs, Awen acts as a creative partner that turns intent into exceptional visuals through conversation.
highlight.zh: Awen 不靠提示詞、參數與節點圖,而是作為創意夥伴,透過對話將意圖轉化為出色的視覺作品。

summary.en: Fusion reactors for ships.
summary.zh: 為船舶打造的核融合反應爐。

highlight.en: Maritime Fusion is building marine-specific tokamak fusion reactors to decarbonize shipping, while commercializing high-temperature superconducting cable.
highlight.zh: Maritime Fusion 正在打造專為海洋環境設計的托卡馬克核融合反應爐以為航運脫碳,並將高溫超導電纜技術商業化。

summary.en: Artificial specialized intelligence — small, task-specific AI models.
summary.zh: 人工專用智慧——小型、任務專用的 AI 模型。

highlight.en: ZeroEntropy trains small, task-specific models for narrow workloads like reranking, embedding, and routing, replacing costly frontier LLMs for cheaper AI.
highlight.zh: ZeroEntropy 為重排序、嵌入、路由等狹義工作訓練小型任務專用模型,取代昂貴的前沿 LLM,打造更快更便宜的 AI。

summary.en: Reinforcement learning for AI agents.
summary.zh: 為 AI 代理打造的強化學習。

highlight.en: Osmosis is a post-training platform that fine-tunes language models with RL to build task-specific models beating foundation models on cost and latency.
highlight.zh: Osmosis 是一套後訓練平台,以強化學習微調語言模型,打造在效能、成本與延遲上勝過基礎模型的任務專用模型。

summary.en: More alpha, less latency: exchange and HFT on one chip.
summary.zh: 更多 alpha、更低延遲:交易所與高頻交易整合於單一晶片。

highlight.en: PAX is a crypto exchange with on-chip technology delivering deterministic nanosecond tick-to-trade latency and integrated HFT co-location facilities.
highlight.zh: PAX 是一家加密貨幣交易所,以晶片內建技術提供確定性的奈秒級行情到成交延遲,並整合高頻交易主機代管設施。

summary.en: AI-powered research desk for hedge funds.
summary.zh: 為對沖基金打造的 AI 研究台。

highlight.en: Trata uses agents to interview hedge fund analysts, write investment research, and distribute it through a subscription.
highlight.zh: Trata 運用代理採訪對沖基金分析師、撰寫投資研究,並以訂閱制方式發布。

summary.en: AI agents for CX teams, starting with training and QA.
summary.zh: 為客戶體驗團隊打造的 AI 代理,從培訓與品質保證起步。

highlight.en: Solidroad's agents train reps in simulation and evaluate live calls, cutting onboarding 50% at BPOs like PartnerHero and lifting Crypto.com CSAT above 90%.
highlight.zh: Solidroad 的代理在模擬環境中培訓客服並評估實際通話,使 PartnerHero 等 BPO 的上手時間減半,並把 Crypto.com 的客戶滿意度提升至逾 90%。

summary.en: We build networks of AI personas that simulate stakeholder opinions.
summary.zh: 我們建構模擬利害關係人意見的 AI 角色網絡。

highlight.en: Artificial Societies simulates how large groups respond to surveys and information, helping F100 enterprises anticipate how investors and customers react.
highlight.zh: Artificial Societies 模擬大群人對問卷與資訊的反應,協助百大企業預判投資人與客戶的反應。

summary.en: Reasoning fine-tuning for LLMs.
summary.zh: 為 LLM 進行推理微調。

highlight.en: TrainLoop makes it effortless for developers to supercharge LLM performance through reinforcement learning.
highlight.zh: TrainLoop 讓開發者能輕鬆透過強化學習大幅提升 LLM 效能。

summary.en: AI voice agents for hotels.
summary.zh: 為飯店打造的 AI 語音代理。

highlight.en: Flowtel is building an operating system for hospitality powered by AI agents that handle everything from booking to room service.
highlight.zh: Flowtel 正在打造由 AI 代理驅動的飯店業作業系統,處理從訂房到客房服務的一切事務。

summary.en: Next-generation power electronics, built in America.
summary.zh: 在美國打造的次世代電力電子。

highlight.en: Steinmetz is an OEM building lighter, cheaper, more efficient power electronics at scale for EVs, robotics, aerospace, and industrial systems.
highlight.zh: Steinmetz 是一家 OEM,為電動車、機器人、航太與工業系統量產更輕、更便宜、更高效的電力電子產品。

summary.en: AI-driven exam prep.
summary.zh: AI 驅動的考試準備。

highlight.en: Alice turns generic course materials into personalized learning and exam prep — "Duolingo for exams" — already used by more than 10,000 college students.
highlight.zh: Alice 將通用課程教材轉化為個人化學習與考試準備,堪稱「考試版 Duolingo」,已有逾 1 萬名大學生使用。

summary.en: An AI teammate that automatically updates your customer-facing docs.
summary.zh: 自動更新你對外文件的 AI 隊友。

highlight.en: Promptless automatically updates customer-facing docs from feature releases, support tickets, and Slack conversations, integrating with any docs platform.
highlight.zh: Promptless 根據功能發布、客服工單與 Slack 對話自動更新對外文件,並可整合任何文件平台。

summary.en: Voice AI teams for Medicare agencies.
summary.zh: 為 Medicare 代理機構打造的語音 AI 團隊。

highlight.en: careCycle's multi-agent voice AI handles the Medicare member journey from contact to enrollment, helping agencies hit 5x higher conversions and fight 50% churn.
highlight.zh: careCycle 的多代理語音 AI 處理 Medicare 會員從接觸到投保的完整旅程,協助代理機構達成 5 倍轉換率並對抗 50% 的流失。

summary.en: Financial OS for modern fleets.
summary.zh: 為現代車隊打造的金融作業系統。

highlight.en: Rally is a financial platform for European fleet operators, who spend over €1T yearly on fuel and upkeep, streamlining payments and automating bookkeeping.
highlight.zh: Rally 是為歐洲車隊營運商打造的金融平台(當地每年逾 1 兆歐元花在燃料與維護),簡化付款並自動化記帳。

summary.en: A regulated derivatives exchange — the first regulated exchange for compute.
summary.zh: 受監管的衍生品交易所——首個運算資源的受監管交易所。

highlight.en: Pluto is building the first regulated exchange for compute, bringing derivatives trading to computing capacity.
highlight.zh: Pluto 正在打造首個運算資源的受監管交易所,將衍生品交易帶入運算能力市場。

summary.en: AI platform for commercial insurance brokerages.
summary.zh: 為商業保險經紀公司打造的 AI 平台。

highlight.en: Vantel is building an AI operating system for commercial insurance brokerages.
highlight.zh: Vantel 正在為商業保險經紀公司打造 AI 作業系統。

summary.en: A Roomba for weeds on a farm.
summary.zh: 農場上的除草版掃地機器人。

highlight.en: Red Barn's autonomous "Field Hand" robot precisely eliminates weeds while leaving crops untouched, tackling weed control that costs the US economy $46B a year.
highlight.zh: Red Barn 的自主機器人「Field Hand」精準除草且不傷作物,解決每年讓美國經濟損失 460 億美元的雜草問題。

summary.en: Navigate any set of data, no matter how large, in minutes.
summary.zh: 無論資料多大,都能在數分鐘內導覽。

highlight.en: Overstand unifies enterprise sources like Slack and email to surface customer and revenue signals, and helps legal firms rapidly understand discovery corpora.
highlight.zh: Overstand 整合 Slack、電子郵件等企業來源以挖掘客戶與營收訊號,並協助律師事務所快速理解證據開示資料。

summary.en: Cursor for designers.
summary.zh: 設計師版的 Cursor。

highlight.en: Onlook is an open-source visual code editor merging design, development, and AI; it hit #1 on Hacker News and topped GitHub trending above DeepSeek.
highlight.zh: Onlook 是一款開源視覺化程式碼編輯器,融合設計、開發與 AI;曾登上 Hacker News 第一,並在 GitHub 趨勢榜超越 DeepSeek。

summary.en: AI teacher assistant for grading essays.
summary.zh: 批改作文的 AI 教師助理。

highlight.en: Edexia learns like a teacher, visually breaking down its grasp of the rubric and updating as the teacher corrects it, grading any curriculum or format.
highlight.zh: Edexia 像教師一樣學習,以視覺方式拆解它對評分標準的理解並隨教師修正而更新,可批改任何課綱或格式的作文。

summary.en: AI tutor starting with maths and science.
summary.zh: 從數學與科學起步的 AI 家教。

highlight.en: Excellence is an after-school maths and science program (a "super Kumon") that adapts courses to each student's knowledge and learning style.
highlight.zh: Excellence 是一套課後數學與科學課程(可謂「超級公文式」),以多模態輔助,依每位學生的程度與學習風格調整課程。

summary.en: Software that maps your infrastructure — open-core alternative to Wiz.
summary.zh: 繪製基礎設施地圖的軟體——Wiz 的開放核心替代方案。

highlight.en: SubImage maps infrastructure assets and their relationships so security teams reduce risk; it's built around the open-source Cartography project.
highlight.zh: SubImage 繪製基礎設施資產及其關聯,讓安全團隊能降低風險;它建構於開源專案 Cartography 之上。

summary.en: AI that fixes enterprise glue.
summary.zh: 修補企業整合接合的 AI。

highlight.en: superglue replaces brittle SQL scripts, cron jobs, and one-off connectors with clean, versioned syncs, so migrating systems or adding tools won't break things.
highlight.zh: superglue 以乾淨、版本化的同步取代脆弱的 SQL 腳本、cron 工作與一次性連接器,讓系統遷移或新增工具不再牽一髮動全身。

summary.en: The SOP automation platform.
summary.zh: 標準作業程序自動化平台。

highlight.en: Altrina automates standard operating procedures to give people back their time, already boosting efficiency for governments, law offices, and hedge funds.
highlight.zh: Altrina 自動化標準作業程序,把時間還給人們,已為政府、律師事務所、保險業者與對沖基金提升效率。

summary.en: AI-powered CAD.
summary.zh: AI 驅動的 CAD。

highlight.en: Adam transforms text into parametric designs so engineering teams can ship 10x faster, aiming to eliminate the gap between engineering and reality.
highlight.zh: Adam 將文字轉化為參數化設計,讓工程團隊出貨速度快 10 倍,目標是消除工程與現實之間的落差。

summary.en: Foundation models to automate x-ray analysis for radiologists.
summary.zh: 為放射科醫師自動化 X 光分析的基礎模型。

highlight.en: Mecha's x-ray foundation model beat Microsoft, Google, and OpenAI on clinical accuracy while far smaller, letting radiologists read a scan every 5 minutes.
highlight.zh: Mecha 的 X 光基礎模型在臨床準確度上勝過 Microsoft、Google 與 OpenAI 且體積小得多,讓放射科醫師每五分鐘即可判讀一張影像。

summary.en: The AI investment analyst.
summary.zh: AI 投資分析師。

highlight.en: finbar is an AI investment analyst used by several top-20 AUM hedge funds, automating financial modelling, research, and data analysis to speed decisions 100x.
highlight.zh: finbar 是一款 AI 投資分析師,獲多家管理資產規模前 20 大的對沖基金採用,自動化財務建模、研究與資料分析,讓決策加速 100 倍。

summary.en: Discovering new pesticides with AI.
summary.zh: 以 AI 發現新型農藥。

highlight.en: Bindwell develops better, safer pesticides in-house using custom AI models.
highlight.zh: Bindwell 以自家客製 AI 模型在內部研發更佳、更安全的農藥。

summary.en: Autonomous electrical engineering.
summary.zh: 自主電機工程。

highlight.en: Stillwind Search turns natural-language queries into fine-grained specs matched against millions of parts, a step toward autonomous electrical engineering.
highlight.zh: Stillwind Search 將自然語言查詢轉為細緻規格,並比對數百萬個零件,作為邁向自主電機工程的第一步。

summary.en: High-quality multilingual training data for AI models.
summary.zh: 為 AI 模型提供高品質多語訓練資料。

highlight.en: AI models are poor in non-English languages because training data is scarce; Mundo AI builds the world's largest, highest-quality multilingual data library.
highlight.zh: AI 模型在非英語語言上表現不佳,因訓練資料稀缺;Mundo AI 正在打造全球最大、品質最高的多語資料庫。

summary.en: Your partner for hotel ownership data.
summary.zh: 你的飯店所有權資料夥伴。

highlight.en: Bystreet connects hotel brands, operators, and vendors directly with the owners and key decision-makers behind tens of thousands of hotels worldwide.
highlight.zh: Bystreet 讓飯店品牌、營運商與供應商能直接連結全球數萬間飯店背後的業主與關鍵決策者。

summary.en: Data for reasoning agents in dynamic environments.
summary.zh: 為動態環境中的推理代理提供資料。

highlight.en: Nitrode builds small, fully specified game environments that generate ground-truth data on state, transitions, and hidden dynamics to train reasoning agents.
highlight.zh: Nitrode 打造小型、規格完整的遊戲環境,生成關於狀態、轉換與隱藏動態的真值資料,以訓練空間與時間推理。

summary.en: Global B2B stablecoin payment processor.
summary.zh: 全球 B2B 穩定幣支付處理商。

highlight.en: Infinite offers businesses turnkey APIs and SDKs to instantly move money anywhere in the world at a fraction of the cost of traditional solutions.
highlight.zh: Infinite 為企業提供即用型 API 與 SDK,以遠低於傳統方案的成本即時在全球各地匯款。

summary.en: In-call AI teleprompter that helps reps close enterprise deals.
summary.zh: 協助業務成交企業案的通話中 AI 提詞機。

highlight.en: Peppr's real-time overlay listens to sales calls and surfaces approved answers and discovery questions, grounded in knowledge across 150+ enterprise tools.
highlight.zh: Peppr 的即時覆蓋層聆聽銷售通話,即時提供核可答案與探詢問題,並以橫跨 150 多種企業工具的公司知識為依據。

summary.en: Misprint is building Robinhood for Pokemon cards.
summary.zh: Misprint 正在打造寶可夢卡牌版的 Robinhood。

highlight.en: Misprint pairs real-time pricing analytics with a buy/sell marketplace to fix opaque collectibles pricing, blending card expertise with machine learning.
highlight.zh: Misprint 結合即時定價分析與買賣市集,解決收藏品定價不透明的問題,並融合卡牌專業知識與機器學習。

summary.en: AI for accounting.
summary.zh: 為會計打造的 AI。

highlight.en: Bluebook's AI agents speed up research, reconciliations, and monthly closings so accountants serve 200 clients instead of 20; 30 leading Nordic firms use it.
highlight.zh: Bluebook 的 AI 代理加速研究、對帳與月結,讓會計師能服務 200 名而非 20 名客戶;北歐 30 家領先事務所已在使用。

summary.en: Building lunar landers.
summary.zh: 打造月球登陸器。

highlight.en: Instinct's small lunar lander is designed to launch as a regular LEO rideshare, enabling higher mission cadence at lower cost — making the Moon "the new LEO."
highlight.zh: Instinct 的小型月球登陸器設計為以一般低地軌道共乘方式發射,以更低成本提高任務頻率,讓月球成為「新的低地軌道」。

summary.en: Financial research platform for investment firms.
summary.zh: 為投資公司打造的金融研究平台。

highlight.en: Fira instantly searches thousands of pages of filings and earnings reports for investment analysts, delivering source-cited answers and verifiable calculations.
highlight.zh: Fira 為投資分析師即時搜尋數千頁的申報文件與財報,提供標註來源的答案與可驗證的計算。

summary.en: Automating refurbishment of $1T in consumer electronics.
summary.zh: 自動化價值 1 兆美元消費電子產品的翻新作業。

highlight.en: Revise's AI robotic system works with e-waste facilities to test, wipe, photograph, and list hundreds of laptops a day for resale, with no human intervention.
highlight.zh: Revise 的 AI 機器人系統與電子廢棄物廠整合,每天無須人工介入即可測試、清除、拍照並上架數百台筆電轉售。

summary.en: Hire amazing engineers by seeing how they use AI.
summary.zh: 透過觀察工程師如何使用 AI 來招募頂尖人才。

highlight.en: Outship captures how candidates break down work and steer AI agents in a cloud workspace alongside their final code, so teams hire engineers with confidence.
highlight.zh: Outship 在雲端工作區中捕捉候選人如何拆解工作、引導 AI 代理,並對照其最終程式碼,讓團隊能放心招募工程師。

summary.en: AI-native consumer lending platform for underserved Americans.
summary.zh: 為服務不足的美國人打造的 AI 原生消費信貸平台。

highlight.en: Karoo targets borrowers outside prime lenders' appetite, where weak competition lets incumbents price gouge, fixing the inefficiency for underserved consumers.
highlight.zh: Karoo 鎖定優質放款方不青睞的借款人,在競爭薄弱、現有業者藉機抬價之處,為服務不足的消費者修補市場低效。

summary.en: We make mobile apps using AI.
summary.zh: 我們用 AI 製作行動應用程式。

highlight.en: a0.dev generates custom React Native projects so mobile developers build high-quality apps in days, with launched apps used by hundreds of thousands.
highlight.zh: a0.dev 生成客製 React Native 專案,協助行動開發者在數天而非數週內打造高品質應用,推出的應用已有數十萬人使用。

summary.en: A foundation model for physics.
summary.zh: 一個物理學的基礎模型。

highlight.en: Trim is building a general-intelligence AI model that can simulate real-world physical systems evolving over time.
highlight.zh: Trim 正在打造一個通用智慧 AI 模型,能模擬真實世界物理系統隨時間的演變。

summary.en: Agentic video editing.
summary.zh: 代理式影片剪輯。

highlight.en: Mosaic's canvas lets anyone create and run their own multimodal video-editing agents, aiming to compress hours of editing work into seconds.
highlight.zh: Mosaic 的畫布讓任何人都能建立並運行自己的多模態影片剪輯代理,目標是把數小時的剪輯工作壓縮到數秒。

summary.en: Robots that repair roads.
summary.zh: 修補道路的機器人。

highlight.en: Pave Robotics builds robots that seal cracks in asphalt 24/7 with higher-quality results than humans, helping paving companies save time and money.
highlight.zh: Pave Robotics 打造能全天候封補柏油裂縫的機器人,品質優於人工,協助鋪路公司節省時間與成本。

summary.en: Fast and data-driven immigration platform.
summary.zh: 快速且資料驅動的移民平台。

highlight.en: Gale simplifies visa applications and compliance for US companies and integrates with HR systems, using automation to keep its coordinated attorneys efficient.
highlight.zh: Gale 為美國公司簡化簽證申請與合規並整合 HR 系統,以自動化讓其協調的律師保持高效。

summary.en: Interactive video models that simulate hyper-realistic environments.
summary.zh: 模擬超寫實環境的互動式影片模型。

highlight.en: Lucid trains action-conditioned video models that replace game and physics engines; its Minecraft model runs at 20+fps on a 4090, 5x faster than rivals.
highlight.zh: Lucid 訓練以動作為條件的影片模型,取代遊戲與物理引擎;其 Minecraft 模型在 4090 上以 20+fps 運行,速度快 5 倍且訓練資源少 100 倍。
